violations.description: FAQ accordion items use clickable divs without aria-expanded state. Screen readers cannot determine whether an accordion section is open or closed.
violations.reference_fix: ...

violations.description: FAQ question elements are divs with cursor:pointer, not actual <button> elements. They cannot be activated via keyboard (Enter/Space) and have no implicit button role.
Accordion triggers have no aria-controls attribute linking them to their associated content panel.

page_description: A documentation site with sidebar navigation and an FAQ accordion section. The accordion uses non-semantic divs without ARIA expanded states, controls, or keyboard accessibility.
